name: ssss-skill-validates-as-primitive
assertion: SKILL.md includes universal SSSS frontmatter plus type: skill, name: ssss, and a trigger-optimized description.

name: ssss-canon-is-evidence-first
assertion: The skill tells agents to inspect package metadata, registry, spec, implementation, and conformance instead of trusting a copied snapshot.

name: ssss-validator-is-dependency-free
assertion: scripts/validate-schema.mjs runs with Node built-ins and validates universal plus primitive-specific fields.

name: ssss-host-boundaries-are-explicit
assertion: The skill distinguishes the vendor-neutral reference kernel from Total Recall and other host adapters.

name: ssss-full-gate-is-named
assertion: The skill requires npm test in the reference repository and the host-specific SSSS conformance gate for adapters.

name: ssss-semantic-default-is-private
assertion: The skill requires structural-only semantic projections by default, with explicit authorization before private or resource-bound indexing.

name: ssss-runtime-rendering-preserves-controls
assertion: The skill requires runtime multilingual rendering and preserves all symbolic control fields.
